privileged_info_summary: The task is a Java exception handling exercise using synthetic code. Five Java source files are created by the setup script: ProcessingException.java (the base exception class), FileProcessor.java, DatabaseConnector.java, ConfigParser.java, and App.java. The metadata's 'required_files' list only includes four of these files and is missing ProcessingException.java, which is the foundational exception class that all other source files depend on. The environment uses Eclipse 2024-12 IDE with OpenJDK 17. All data is synthetically generated (embedded in bash scripts) with no external data sources. The task runs with a 600-second timeout and up to 50 steps.
